title: rubus × subcylindricus
intro: Rubus × subcylindricus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Raspberry Bramble, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, characterized by its unique cylindrical canes and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × subcylindricus include its high content of antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × subcylindricus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and provide anti-inflammatory properties. Rubus × subcylindricus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
